title: Khong gian quan ly

work.title: Cong viec quan ly
work.summary: Ca lam viec chinh thuc da cong bo trong pham vi duoc phan cong.

events.title: Su kien quan ly
events.summary: Hien thi va tac vu su kien cho pham vi duoc phan cong.
events.disabledReason: Hop dong Manager Events chua duoc bat.
events.readinessMessage: Su kien quan ly chi la trang thai san sang trong batch nay. Khong co route Manager Events hoac du lieu Admin Event nao duoc hien thi tai day.

groups.title: Nhom quan ly
groups.summary: Ngu canh Org Unit va Talent Group duoc phan cong.
groups.disabledReason: Hop dong Manager Groups rieng chua duoc bat.
groups.readinessMessage: Nhom quan ly chi la trang thai san sang trong batch nay. Tong quan van hien thi tom tat pham vi duoc phan cong; khong mo route Groups rieng hoac trang thiet lap.

members.title: Thanh vien quan ly
members.summary: Ngu canh thanh vien cho pham vi duoc phan cong.
members.disabledReason: Hop dong Manager Members chua duoc bat.
members.readinessMessage: Thanh vien quan ly chi la trang thai san sang trong batch nay. People Hub va du lieu Admin EmploymentProfile khong duoc hien thi nhu module Manager Members.
